summary: Issue #412 adds typed packages/ui core elements (Button, Badge, Chip, ProgressBar, HealthBar) with theme-token styling, Vietnamese copy, a11y contracts, and Vitest coverage. Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass. Root check:demo now includes pnpm --filter @juli/ui test.

interfaceChanges.interface: Button, Badge, ConfidenceBadge, StatusChip, FilterChip, InputChip, ProgressBar, RealEstimatedProgressBar, HealthBar
interfaceChanges.description: Adds typed core UI element primitives with theme-token CSS and Vietnamese defaults.
Adds semantic success/warning/destructive/info and brand gradient tokens for element styling.
Import-boundary proof that demo can consume new @juli/ui core exports.

mappings.criterion: Each element exists as a typed packages/ui export with render + interaction-state tests (default, hover, pressed, focus-visible, disabled, loading, error, empty — only the states that apply to that element)
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/import-boundary.test.ts::exports the core element families for apps/demo consumption

mappings.criterion: Tokens originate from packages/theme; no hardcoded colors/spacing in the element implementation
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/badge.test.tsx::uses theme tokens and disables live pulse under reduced motion

mappings.criterion: 44×44px minimum touch target and visible focus-visible state on every interactive element
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/button.test.tsx::applies size classes and meets the 44px touch-target contract

mappings.criterion: prefers-reduced-motion respected in any element with a transition/animation
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/progress-bar.test.tsx::uses theme tokens and disables estimated glow under reduced motion

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese copy where the element renders text; no English fallback strings
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/badge.test.tsx::renders confidence badges with Vietnamese text labels

mappings.criterion: Import-boundary tests confirm these elements are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*

recommendations: Extract shared clampPercent helper if more bar components are added in composition issues.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no CRITICAL reliability, security, or a11y gaps. CI gap closed by adding @juli/ui tests to check:demo.

ownerSignoff.statement: AC coverage mapped; element tests and import-boundary proof verified; check:demo includes @juli/ui.

reviewBasis: working tree at fixed point 35292a1c1c78d63af2f2eaf1100e2b7c886e3c86 plus check:demo wiring
